title: Velarum officinale

taxonomy: Velarum officinale is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spurge family. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, with over 2,800 species worldwide. The Euphorbiaceae family includes a range of plants, from trees and shrubs to annuals and perennials. Members of the Euphorbiaceae family are typically characterized by their milky sap, simple leaves, and small, often globular flowers. Velarum officinale's classification within the Euphorbiaceae family is based on its shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other species in this group.
properties: Velarum officinale is a lesser-known plant, however its common name is 'Horned Poppy', but no reliable information is available regarding its therapeutic properties.
